instruction: Eight identical hearts. Recolor ONLY h5 (the fifth one) red (#e63946). All seven other hearts must remain pixel-identical at #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 304 64" width="304" height="64">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="304" height="64" fill="white" />
  <g id="h1" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(8, 16) scale(1.3333)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>

  <g id="h4" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(116, 16) scale(1.3333)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
